d-forward barrel silhouette, high stretch, dark wash, and a softer feel. Better if comfort is your top priority and you like a more fashion-forward fit.

Honestly, is the pricier one worth the extra, or is the cheaper one fine?

These two are the same price at $119, so there is no pricier option between them. If you are choosing just on value, the cheaper one is not a factor here.

Between the two, Meg is the better all-around value if you want a versatile, safer pick. Ashton is worth it if you specifically want more stretch and a more trend-forward barrel shape.
